publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-03-24 23:19:32 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Papers of Percy Reese Morgan, a fruit farmer in Lewiston, N.Y. and observer for the U.S. Weather Bureau in the Lewiston area.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Fruit farmer in Lewiston, N.Y. and observer for the U.S. Weather Bureau in the Lewiston area. His wife was Mary Dodge Morgan.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence with family, friends, business associates and public officials; farm records; farm animal health and veterinary records; weather reports, 1949-1960; handwritten and typescript diaries, 1921-1961; extension reports; records of the Lewiston-Queenston Rotary Club; items relating to the New York State Horticultural Association; and pamphlets and brochures.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Percy Reese Morgan papers, #4449. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Conservation reports, Extension service reports, invoices. "C". (1.)
Conservation reports, correspondence, Extension service reports, invoices. "C". (3.)
Correspondence, a play written by PRW, memorials for Mary Dodge Morgen, invoices. "P".
Rotary club correspondence, invoices, other correspondence. "R". (1.)
Rotary club correspondence, invoices, other correspondence. "R". (2.)
Animal health reports, bills and invoices. "V".
Estate Appraisal of Felix Woolworth done by PRM, wheat allotment reports, correspondence, bills. "W". (1.)
Extension Service Programs and Information sheets.
Erie County Savings Bank book. (Buffalo, N.Y.)
Lewiston Meat Market and Frozen Food Locker Service.
Miscellaneous - Fruit, Bulbs, other information sheets.
New York Telephone Company Service statements.
Niagara County Historical Society and local history.
Niagara Mohawk Power Corporation Electric bills.
Obituaries (Mary Dodge Morgan and Percy Reese Morgan).
Tax Forms for fuel and other farm equipment.
United States Department of Commerce Weather Bureau Certificate of Authority.
Water Department Bills, Town of Lewiston, New York.
Weather Reports, Correspondence and newspaper clippings.
Correspondence with Richard Templeton including court documents re: last will and testament of Hiram Dodge.
Personal typescript diary of Percy Reese Morgan. (PRM)
Bound typescript diary of Percy Reese Morgan. (PRM)
